title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates how to build JobPilot, a full-stack AI job application platform using nine context files and five open-source agent skills to prevent agent drift. The workflow integrates InsForge for authentication, Browserbase for web automation, Adzuna for job discovery, PostHog for analytics, and PDF generation for resume handling.
